description_long: This bungalow features a long, rectangular footprint with a prominent gable roof covered in dark gray shingles. The front facade includes a covered porch supported by columns, furnished with outdoor seating, and a paved driveway leading to a side entrance. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, and the windows are trimmed in a contrasting yellow, adding a touch of warmth. A single car is parked in the driveway, and there are landscaped bushes at the rear corner of the house. The structure appears to be a single-story residence, typical of suburban neighborhoods, with a simple yet functional design. The overall appearance is clean and modern, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on practicality.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, covered front porch, light exterior walls, and a driveway with a parked car. The design is modern and functional, with yellow-trimmed windows and minimal landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, driveway, and a car parked beside the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, uninterrupted wall and the full length of the gable roof.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the back of the house, a small extension, and landscaped bushes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the driveway, car, and the rear landscaping, with the porch partially visible.
